title: The Corrupted Past
description: He destroyed it all. He killed us all. He did this to us.
body:
**WARNING: THIS MOD IS IN ITS BETA PHASE SO EXPECT THERE TO BE BUGS**
Uhh this is my first mod, This mod is inspired by, The Broken Script, and SplitSelf (this mod is not finished duh) and this mod is ONLY avalable on Modrinth and Curseforge, also this is a HORROR mod if it wasnt obvious enough. Anyways this mod contains: Biomes, events, dimentions, mobs, structure, LORE, ect. And the lore of this mod is like kinda of a mix between the broken script and splitself. Best played with shaders. Curseforge link: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-broken-past 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![idk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9baad6b9b80c1a5166869dd65aa7844fc23e596_0.webp)

</details>

PSS: I am the ONLY one working on the mod so dont expect it to be good alr? 💔

Also if there is ANY bugs, glitches, questions, ect with my mod PLEASE email me at aidanburchfield34@gmail.com 

Shaders used in gallery: Cursed fog by LoLip_p

my yt channel: https://www.youtube.com/@TheCorruptedPastOffical

join the discord: https://discord.gg/66TAfaNQ
